source_jobs.title: General Application
source_jobs.description:
<p>Our general application--if you'd like to be considered for future roles or if you believe you bring skills we need that we don't know we need yet, explain!</p>
<p>IMPORTANT: Include the title you are looking for in your last name, and do it in caps lock. For example: if your name is Karina M., and you are looking for an Alliance Manager role, please submit your name as "Karina M. ALLIANCE MANAGER"</p>

source_jobs.title: Partner Development Manager
Sales Development Representative

notes: Only 3 jobs posted, mostly sales and business development roles
